ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND ( OR(ISCHANGED( Revenue_Share_Flat_Fee__c ) , ISCHANGED( Revenue_Share_Percentage__c ) ), NOT(Revenue_Share_Included__c), NOT($Profile.Name == 'System Administrator'), RecordType.DeveloperName ='Agreement'
)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please Enable Revenue Share Included before updating Revenue Share Flat Fee or Revenue Share Percentage.
